titles.title: With My Life in Your Hands

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All of my life has been a struggle Throwing my faith against the wind Now that You're in my life, it's peaceful Knowing my spirit has no end

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I need Your love now to guide me Knowing You'll show me the way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With my life in Your hands I can walk with head held high It's the feeling I've dreamed of forever With my life in Your hands Every day is simplified 'Cause I'm living in Your love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Why did I let things get so crazy, Lord Trying on my own 'til You came along How could I ever try to thank You, Lord For being there when nobody cared

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: With my life in Your hands I can walk with head held high It's the feeling I've dreamed of forever With my life in Your hands Every day is simplified 'Cause I'm living in Your love 'Cause I'm living in Your love
